summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Fidelity Short-Term Bond ETF (FSTB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed to invest in a broad portfolio that holds global investment grade debt securities with an average maturity of three years or less. FSTB was launched on Sep 15, 1986 and is issued by Fidelity.
